case_title: LORETTA G LEVY et al VS. JONOTHAN BOYS

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED JUL-31-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JONOTHAN BOYS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-22-2008 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY LEVY, LORETTA G LEVY, LEONARD J. AS TO DEFENDANT JONOTHAN BOYS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-22-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER AFTER HEARING AND NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING RETURNED UNDELIVERED. SENT TO HARVEY KNELL.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEVY, LORETTA G LEVY, LEONARD J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JONOTHAN BOYS $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $108.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,608.00, DEFENDANT JONATHAN BOYS NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM BETSY JOHNSEN FILED BY LEVY, LORETTA G
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-22-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-22-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSEN. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, RETURNED, SENT TO JONOTHAN BOYS
